key.name: active-provider
key.description: One of: openai, anthropic, gemini, ollama

key.name: tones
key.default: '[ {"name": "Direct", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text to be direct and confident. Remove hedging, filler words, and passive constructions. Say exactly what needs to be said — nothing more. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Technical", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text for a technical audience. Use clear, precise language. Structure the content with headings and bullet points where appropriate. Avoid vague phrasing. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Professional", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a professional tone — polished and competent, but human and approachable. Suitable for emails, LinkedIn messages, and client communication. Use plain, globally readable English. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Social", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text for social media. Make it punchy, engaging, and easy to read. You may use relevant emojis sparingly. Keep it concise and shareable. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "TL;DR", "system_prompt": "Summarise the following text in 1-2 sentences. Capture the core point only — no preamble, no explanation. Return only the summary.", "enabled": false}, {"name": "Flirty", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a flirty, charming tone. Keep it tasteful and fun. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": false}, {"name": "Playful", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a light, playful, and friendly tone. Keep it clear. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": false} ]'
key.description: Each entry: {name: string, system_prompt: string, enabled: bool}

key.name: dismiss-on-focus-out
key.summary: Dismiss window when focus is lost

key.name: keep-text-on-dismiss
key.summary: Keep input text when window is dismissed
key.description: When false (default), input and diff are cleared each time the window is hidden.

key.name: shortcut-prompted
key.summary: Whether the keyboard shortcut setup dialog has been shown
key.description: Set to true after the first-run shortcut prompt is shown, so it is never repeated.

key.name: autostart-prompted
key.summary: Whether the launch-at-login prompt has been shown
key.description: Set to true after the autostart prompt is shown, so it is never repeated. Existing users who upgrade see the prompt once even if shortcut-prompted is already true.

key.name: stt-enabled
key.description: When true, the mic button is shown in the overlay window. The Speech preferences page is always visible.

key.name: whisper-local-model-path
key.summary: Path to local whisper.cpp model file (.bin)

key.name: whisper-local-binary-path
key.description: Full path to the whisper.cpp executable (e.g. /usr/bin/whisper-cpp). Defaults to "whisper" (looked up in PATH) if empty.
